CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'var1', 'test_value1');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'var2', 'test_value2');
SELECT name, (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS value1, 'session_var' AS session_variable FROM test_table;
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE name = SET CONNECTION 'my_variable';
SET CONNECTION 'nested_value' = (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table));
SET CONNECTION 'complex_structure' = (SELECT ARRAY(SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '%test%')));
SET CONNECTION 'var3' = (SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id = 2);
SET CONNECTION 'multi_table_value' = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table UNION SELECT 'additional_value') AS combined);
